title: IMPACT ON CCD BY NEW TECHNOLOGIES
author: Sabyrbaeva G.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: To improve the processes of producing hard-to-recover reserves in these areas, additional methods of influence are applied by injecting a certain volume of water into the reservoir through new injection wells created by drilling them or transferring existing highly watered wells for injection. At the same time, work is being carried out in existing wells to increase their productivity.
steps_raw: To improve the processes of producing hard-to-recover reserves in these areas, additional methods of influence are applied by injecting a certain volume of water into the reservoir through new injection wells created by drilling them or transferring existing highly watered wells for injection. At the same time, work is being carried out in existing wells to increase their productivity.
keywords: oil, gas, water, polymer, reagent, well, extraction, processing, technology, formation.
